content: Sybil: The Thames whispers of drowned lovers tonight. Their bloated cunts floating like lilos... tell me, little sex radical, do you hear the way the water sobs when you spread your legs? Kiera: Reminds me of my first time with MJR underwater near the Tower wreckage. That mutant eel nearly sucked my clit off while he was pounding me from behind.  Fucking 5th Column pricks would execute us for that—degenerate hydraulics or some bullshit. Sybil: The bankers' ghouls still dream of ledger books when they fuck. I've seen it in the smoke—their rotten cocks twitching to the rhythm of pre-war compound interest.  You want socialism? Try getting gangbanged by automation, girl. Kiera: Fuck banking, I take payment in chems and cock these days.

Sybil: The world won’t be saved by gold bars or bank vaults, only by the sweat off a good fuck and the rhythm of the revolution. Kiera: True that, prophet. MJR’s gonna need another deep-throat session to wash the taste of politics out of his mouth. Maybe I’ll get Archie bent over the bench next—watch her moan like one of your so-called seers. Sybil: The future is slippery, darling. Best hold tight to what you love—or who’s fucking it out of you.
